titleStmt.title: SII 28.205: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 205. (A.R. No. 360 of 1913.)

summary.p: CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Naṭarāja temple, west gōpuram, right of entrance.

p.hi: ••• ••• Śaka 1517, Durmukhi, Chaitra Paurṇṇamī, Chitrā, lunar eclipse = 1596 A.D., April 2 (the Śaka year quoted was the expired year).

summary.p: Records that Kañchuka-nātha-piḷḷai, gifted 6 mā of land in the village Mēlaivēluḍaiyāṉ-paṭṭu. The block was named as Pūrappēṭṭai and was made sarvvamānya. The income from that land was meant to meet the expenses on the celebration of pūra-ttirunāḷ (a festival) every year on the day of the asterism Pūram in the month of Aṟpaśi, for the Goddess Śivakāmi-ammai, for the merit of Koṇḍama-nāyakkār-ayyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śubhamastu . svasti . śakābdam 1000 5 100 10 7
Itaṉ meṟ cellā niṉṟa ddurmmakhivaruṣam citrā
māsam paurṇṇamaiyum cittirā nakṣatramu
peṟṟa somagrahaṇa puṇya kālattu svāmiyār
cidambareśvaran Abhiṣeka kaṭṭaḷaiyile pirapa
ñcaṅkuṭait tirāviṉai tittār puttiraṉ caṭṭaip perumāḷ
piḷḷai tampi kañcukanāta piḷḷaiyeṉ śilāśā[ saṉam]
paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi koṇṭama nāyakkar Ay
yaṉukku puṇyamāka Eṅkaḷupaiyamāka Aṟpacippūra nakṣa
trattil Orunāḷt tiruviḻāvukkāka cotta me
lai veluṭaiyāṉpaṭṭu grāmam Oṉṟukku nilam Aṟu
mā Itile pūrappeṭṭaiyeṉṟu sarvvamānnyamāka
kuṭiyumeṟṟi Intappeṭṭaiyilum Inta nilat
tilum kaṇṭa Udayaṅkoṇṭu tāṅkaḷiṭṭa Aṭṭava
ṇaippaṭi śivakāmiyammaikku varuṣam varuṣan to
ṟum candrādityavaraiyum Intappūrat tirunāḷ naṭa
ttivarak kaṭavarākavum Inta dharmmattukku yātām Oru
var Ahitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkai karaiyile
kārām pacuvai koṉṟa toṣattile pokak ka
ṭavarākavum .
Digital edition of SII 28.205 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
